scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n DB,API,WEB -c blue,green,cyan "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/backend && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=src/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset: cd packages/backend && npx prisma migrate reset --force --schema=src/prisma/schema.prisma
